title: Custom contexts not supported with image builds
body:
I have code that constructs a tarball in memory using the `tarfile` library.  My context is relatively small (though not empty) and I already have all of its contents as variables in memory, so it's faster and simpler for me to copy them around once more in memory than it is to write a bunch of files to a temporary directory and then have podman read them back in.

I'd like to pass my generated tarball directly into podman, rather than extracting it into a temporary directory and having podman-py tar it back up for me.

This is supported by the Docker Client via the `custom_context` argument to the `build()` method.  podman-py has this argument but documents it as `(ignored)` currently.
